overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Gryffindor student exploring the dormitory, descending through a spiral staircase and grand gallery, and entering the bustling common room with its distinctive red tapestries and fireplace. The video showcases detailed gothic architecture with warm lighting mixing natural window light and interior lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular dormitory room with four-poster beds and central stove

events.description: approaching and opening the wooden door to exit the dormitory

agents.ego_description: walking through the dormitory room, passing four-poster beds and a central iron stove, heading toward the exit door

entered.detail: dark wood four-poster beds with red and blue bedding arranged around the circular room
tall black iron stove with vertical pipe extending to the ceiling
light brown wooden plank flooring with circular rug
rough grey stone walls with wooden beams and red pennant banners

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a circular dormitory room with four-poster beds arranged around the perimeter. A central iron stove with a tall pipe stands in the middle of the wooden floor, and red pennants hang from the stone walls. The character heads toward a wooden door at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone spiral staircase with narrow arched windows

events.description: entering the stone spiral staircase from the dormitory
reaching the bottom of the spiral stairs and approaching the exit door

agents.ego_description: descending the winding stone staircase, following the spiral path downward

entered.detail: winding stone staircase with worn steps curving downward
tall narrow arched windows letting in bright light
rough-hewn stone walls with wall-mounted lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow stone spiral staircase, descending the worn stone steps. Narrow gothic windows pierce the thick stone walls, casting beams of light onto the steps. Wall-mounted lanterns provide additional warm lighting as the character curves downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate wood-paneled gallery with grand staircase and suits of armor

events.description: exiting the stone staircase into the bright wood-paneled gallery
turning to descend the grand wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper gallery and descending the grand wooden staircase, passing suits of armor and portraits

entered.detail: sweeping wooden staircase with ornate railings descending to lower level
rich dark wood paneling covering the walls with intricate carvings
tall stained glass windows flooding the space with bright morning light
full suit of medieval armor standing guard near the wall
oil paintings in gold frames hanging on the wood-paneled walls

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stone staircase, the character enters a grand gallery with ornate wood paneling and a sweeping wooden staircase. Bright morning light streams through large stained glass windows, illuminating suits of armor and framed portraits. The character descends the grand staircase, following the curve of the ornate wooden railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor leading to the common room entrance

events.description: entering the stone corridor from the wooden gallery
approaching the brightly lit entrance to the common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone corridor toward the common room entrance

entered.detail: grey stone block walls with arched doorways
large stone archway marking the entrance to the common room
long red patterned carpet running the length of the corridor
wooden bulletin board with papers and notices pinned to it

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower stone corridor with a red carpet runner leading forward. The walls are constructed of grey stone blocks, and a wooden notice board hangs on the right wall. The character walks toward a large stone archway, with bright light spilling from the entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with red tapestries, large fireplace, and comfortable seating areas

events.description: entering the Gryffindor common room from the corridor
approaching the large stone fireplace with burning fire
turning to explore the seating area near the large windows

agents.ego_description: exploring the common room, walking past students seated on sofas, examining the fireplace, tapestries, and portraits on the walls

notable_agents.action: student sitting on red leather sofa reading a book
group of students conversing near the fireplace

entered.detail: massive stone fireplace with roaring fire and carved mantelpiece
crimson wall hangings with gold embroidery covering the stone walls
plush red leather sofas and armchairs arranged in seating groups
tall gothic windows with diamond-patterned glass letting in bright light
moving magical portraits in ornate frames covering the walls
tall dark wood bookcases filled with books and curiosities
large antique globe on a wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character enters the spacious Gryffindor common room, dominated by red tapestries and a massive stone fireplace with a roaring fire. Students sit on plush red leather sofas reading and conversing. The character explores the room, passing wooden bookshelves, a large globe, and walls covered with moving magical portraits, while bright light streams through tall gothic windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate seclusion of a student dormitory into the expansive, bustling warmth of the Gryffindor common room. It begins by navigating a circular room filled with four-poster beds and red pennants before passing through a wooden door into a narrow stone spiral staircase. As the character descends through beams of light and warm lantern glow, the scene opens into a grand gallery where morning light streams through stained glass windows and illuminates suits of armor. The camera then transitions through a grey stone corridor with a red carpet runner, moving toward a bright archway that leads into the heart of the house. Finally, the space expands into the spacious common room, shifting from the quiet stone halls to a vibrant environment dominated by a roaring fireplace, plush red sofas, and moving magical portraits.
